title.rendered: Rustic Barn Wedding at Rolling Meadow Farm | Sade + Luke

content: We hopped on a plane to Greensboro, NC for Sade + Luke’s wedding at Rolling Meadow Farm, and honestly? 10/10, worth it. The rustic barn backdrop was already a dream, but the best part was getting to reconnect with an old friend on his happiest day ever and finally meet his amazing wife. The weather tried to mess with us — threatening rain — but instead we got full sunshine, golden hour fields, and then boom… the

title.rendered: Hudson Valley Barn Engagement | Kate + Steve

content: Kate and Steve’s Hudson Valley barn engagement wasn’t just pretty pictures — it was their family’s barn, the exact spot where they’ll say “I do” this November. That already makes it personal, but then you add a golden hour that hit just right, a little haze of farm dust floating in the light, and even their new puppy and lots of puppy kisses, and suddenly the whole place felt alive. This summer’s been cooler than the usual New York heatwave, so we had the perfect evening to wander between fie

content: Cold Spring NY Wedding dreams come to life in the scenic Hudson Valley, where nature and charm combine to create unforgettable celebrations. Nestled in the heart of this picturesque region, Cold Spring, NY, served as the perfect backdrop for Zeynep and Dominic’s stunning wedding. With its charming streets, breathtaking river views, and vibrant green foliage, this Hudson Valley treasure set the stage for a remarkable day filled with love and elegance. title.rendered: Family Photo Shoot at Villa del Balbianello | Lake Como Italy

content:
Have you ever dreamed of visiting a fairy-tale villa on the shores of a beautiful lake? That’s exactly what we did when we went to Villa del Balbianello, one of the most marvelous places on Lake Como. We were fortunate enough to have our dear friends and gorgeous Artiles family join us for this unforgettable experience. And of course, we couldn’t miss the opportunity to capture some stunning photos of our happy moments together.

Villa del Balbianello is not j

title.rendered: 50th Anniversary Photography

content: For us, there’s nothing more special then to witness this kind of celebrations! 50 years of marriage is something truly special, a huge milestone on its own. And having your family throw a surprise party for you to celebrate this incredible milestone makes it even more special! Congratulations Angela & Heberto! Enjoy some of our favorite images of this gorgeous celebration!

title.rendered: Vizcaya Portrait Session

content:
Vizcaya has always been a playground for us as photographers, because it has so much to offer. From the beautiful mansion that’s an iconic place to visit in South Florida, to the gorgeous manicured gardens that are always breathtaking to see.

When we bring our clients here, we love seeing their reactions. When they see the new scenes for their photo shoot, even though Vizcaya is one place for their photoshoot, it truly offers so many different scenarios. The bay is definitely

title.rendered: Family Beach Sunrise Photos | Cardiello Family

content:
Time for our yearly family sessions to start rolling. We LOVE it when its this family’s turn as they are dear friends and truly so special to us

This year they decided to go for a different look so we headed at 6AM to Pompano beach for a sunrise photo session. Worth is? 100%!! The only way to get the water and crazy sky colors is at sunrise for South Florida and trust me, those colors will not disappoint, they are simply incredible!

Enjoy some of our favorites from this bea

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park Family Session | Giacaman Family

content:
Happy anniversary to our brother and sister!!! What a more precious way to celebrate such an important day than keeping these memories forever!

We took these photos right after hurricane Ian, so you could only imagine the amount of mosquitos there were after so much rain! We had to literally rush to take them before they would eat us alive lol. but you wouldn’t even imagine that by looking at the pictures! They did so good!

We went to one of our favorites parks to do famil

title.rendered: Sheraton Suites Fort Lauderdale Plantation Wedding | Jessica + Kiran

content:
What happens when you mix an Indian family with a Jewish family for a wedding? You get the FUNNEST wedding EVER! Even though there was a huge thunderstorm outside of the building, inside the party was lit! We’ve known the Levine family for many years, since Jessica’s sister got married! And we feel so blessed to be able to keep photographing this beautiful family!

Thank you for having us create memories for you to cherish forever! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Whitney Farms Golf Course Wedding – Monroe, CT | Jennifer + Gregory

content:
Jennifer and Gregory had their destination wedding at the Whitney Farms Gold Club in Monroe, CT. We met the very day of their wedding! Here’s how:

Just about two weeks prior to their wedding, I received a text message from Jennifer to see if we were available for their big day. After having to postpone their wedding during covid like many couples, they officially got married a year and a half ago and finally were able to celebrate their marriage with their closest family and frien

title.rendered: Destination Wedding – Destin, FL | Dawn + Terry

content:
This next DESTINation wedding was everything! We flew out to Destin, FL to shoot Dawn and Terry’s big day and were so happy to finally be able to meet them!

First of all, if you haven’t been to Destin yet, what are you waiting for? With a little bit of Mexico, Naples and Key West, Destin has the best of all worlds combined. From awesome food trucks to gorgeous Greek-like towns. Travelers from all over the US fly to Destin to enjoy the party scene but also the gorgeous cryst

title.rendered: Deer Creek Country Club Wedding | Sabrina + Andersson

content:
Had the pleasure of shooting Sabrina and Andersson this past weekend at the Deer Creek Country Club in Deerfield Beach.

We’ve known the Duarte’s for such a long time and it was so awesome being able to be a part of this very special day and being able to capture these beautiful moments for Sabrina and Andersson.

@Janydidmyhair rocked Sabrina’s hair and makeup and the Deer Creek Country Club was absolutely amazing to shoot at. We had the perfect day with clear s

title.rendered: Doral Park Country Club | Heidy + David

content:
Heidy is a very special girl to us, she’s the sweetest person in the room, funny and always giving, so when she called us to let us know about her wedding plans, we were so excited for her and honored to be part of her special day!

The day started with us capturing some quick getting ready shots of Heidy and David, and when I say quick I mean 20 minutes quick for both bride and groom who were getting ready at the same location, then we headed to a beautiful Kingdom Hall to witnes

title.rendered: Atticus Roche | Miami Newborn Session

content: One of our favorite sessions to shoot are newborn lifestyle photography, specially when dear friends calls us to capture these moments for them. Meet baby Atticus, the newest member to this gorgeous family! He’s a tiny little bundle of joy. Enjoy some of our favorites from this very special miami newborn session:

title.rendered: South Florida Engagement Session | Heidy + David

content: What an honor it was to take these quick images of our friend Heidy and David. This was the most chill and casual session we’ve ever done. We went to our small park next to our house and litteraly took 15 minutes to take these quick images of them. We literally cannot wait till the wedding day! You guys make such a beautiful couple and we love to be part of your memories in this very special way! Love you, enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Weston Baby Shower | Atticus

content: Katrina and Billy are very special to us. They are dear friends of ours and we’ve been working together with them for a long time. We feel blessed to be called for their special events like births, baby showers, family events and yearly photo sessions. It’s so special to be part of our friends family this way. Their home has a gallery of moments throughout their history together and we feel blessed to have created so many of those memories for them that they will cherish forever.

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park Family Session | Grugal Family

content: This session hits our hearts so much. After seeing a post we made on instagram about how special your pets are we got a message asking us to do this family session because they don’t know how much more time they have left with their precious dog. Broke our hearts to hear this but felt so privileged to be able to give this family these memories to cherish forever with their beloved family member. The Grugal’s are also celebrating their 20th anniversary so we took advantage to make

title.rendered: Coral Gables Entrance Park

content: For this session we went to one of our favorite spots in South Florida that screams “Europe”. No, its not Vizcaya, we are talking about the Coral gables Entrance Park also known as “El Prado Entrance”.

title.rendered: Greenpoint Loft Wedding – Brooklyn | Nessa + Torry

content:
Just a few months ago, we were together with Nessa and Torry for their engagement session. By the time the session ended, we nearly froze to death. Clearly, the cold loves us. Despite spring finally springing, it was a nice and cool day on this Brooklyn wedding day.

Before heading to The Williamsburg Hotel we did a pit stop at Upstate Stock to get fueled up for the day. It’s our fave! Nessa awaited us at

title.rendered: Newborn Photography | Emilia

content:
Lately, I’ve had the honor to work with brand new clients. By brand new, I mean new to the world! This little one is just six days old in these photos. Her name is Emilia and she was absolutely fantastic to work with!

Just a few weeks ago, I got to shoot her while she was still baking in the oven! Can’t believe she’s out in this world now, loved so much by her parents and everyone around her!

Check out her very first glamour shots, how do you think she did?

title.rendered: Lightner Museum Wedding | Jane + Dez

content:
After 20 years of creating moments and memories for beautiful people, I don’t think that we’ve ever taken so many photos in any wedding, ever!

I still can’t believe that it’s only been a year since Jane + Dez got engaged at the Secret Gardens in Miami and now we are here, witnessing one of the most important days of their lives at t

title.rendered: Lifestyle Newborn Session | Jaelyn

content:
This lifestyle newborn session was extremely special to me. I got to photograph my dear friends’ newborn, Jaelyn. They’re not just any friends, they’re the couple that we got to see fall in love with eachother right from the very day they met. I photographed their proposal, engagement, wedding, baby reveal and now this newborn session.

I’ve never seen so much love in one room. Being able to capture some natural, candid, shots of this new mama was just an amazing

title.rendered: Glen Island Park Maternity, NY | Paula

content:
For this next maternity sesh, we ended up nailing the PERFECT day during this bipolar spring weather here in NY.

Glen Island Park is such a great, diverse, location for some awesome pics. From castle to ruins, harbor to docks, greenery to beautiful trees. It has it all! On this 70 degree day, we took some light and airy boho shots of this mommy to be, Paula.

Maternity sessions, to me, aren’t just about the belly but the journey. What you’re feeling, how empowered you

title.rendered: Miami Studio Headshots | Kata + Carlos
Miami Family Session | Von Kretschmann Family

content: All the way from Chile meet this gorgeous family! Carol (the one with the green shirt) is my sister in law that I happen to consider my best friend in life. I know not everyone is so blessed to have friendships like this one so if you do, always try to remind them how special they are. It’s funny how things happened, how we met and all the things we’ve lived together ever since. We’ve known each other since we were 13, we even went to the same school and we’ve been be

title.rendered: Awosting Falls Engagement | Nessa + Torry

content:
They’ve been friends since they were 17. He loves Brooklyn, she loves nature. Meet Nessa and Torry!

He popped the question right at Central Park, I mean, how dreamy is that? Despite both being from the city, they wanted an upstate engagement session. Tricky part? Um, it’s kind of freezing!

Despite the ridiculously cold weather, we decided to go for it. Awosting Falls is the perfect spot for an engagement session. The best part? It was totally empty! The cold kept every

title.rendered: Pullman Miami Airport Hotel Wedding | Oni + Noel

content:
The day is finally here! We got to witness Oni and Noel say “I Do” at the Pullman Miami Airport Hotel for their wedding.

A perfect winter day? This one! In South Florida that is…Sunny sky, zero humidity and most importantly, it wasn’t 20 degrees.

This wedding was proudly sponsored by lifesavers, because we sure did have some of them. Despite the many little hiccups, we all made it through. The weather could not have been MORE perfect! This wedding was a t

title.rendered: Boho Senior Portrait, Bal Harbour | Jocelyn

content:
Senior sessions don’t come too too often for us, but when they do, we LOVE them.

We got to shoot Jocelyn’s boho senior portrait sesh at Bal Harbour Beach, one of our favorite beach locations to shoot at.

Working with Jocelyn was so refreshing and inspiring. Despite never having met her before, we felt an instant connection and my camera sure felt it! I asked her to give me a little vision of what she wanted and the rest was so easy. Capturing her contagious, energetic

title.rendered: Crystal Ballroom Wedding | Alissa + Imran

content:
We had the opportunity to shoot Alissa and Imran’s Indian wedding ceremony and now we get to do it all over again at the Crystal Ballroom in Beach Place, Fort Lauderdale!

This multicultural couple has been a true blast to work with! A little boy, a newborn and having to plan two weddings, sure wasn’t an easy task. Yet

title.rendered: Wynwood Portrait | Alexa

content:
Had the pleasure of working with Alexa for this amazing Wynwood portrait featuring some of the amazing boho accessories from Kashii Designs!

Everyone knows Wynwood screams color and these amazing colors brought to life these beautiful crafted pieces made by wayuu artisans right from Colombia.

We got to shoot some of these pieces to be featured on their website and ig to prove that these amazing a

title.rendered: Robbins Preserve Family Session | Seedman Family

content:
It was an absolute pleasure being able to be a part of the Seedman’s Family session for this year!

This little family was celebrating life, milestones and happiness while getting ready to run a 5k the next day. Truly inspirational family and I’m so happy I got to work with you all.

Robbins Preserve Park has been so fun to shoot at. No matter the amount of times we come here, it’s always a new perspective and no two sessions are ever the same.

Thank you for

title.rendered: Newborn Photography | Celine

content:
This next post has our hearts! We got to do Celine’s newborn photography session at only 2 weeks old!

These proud parents got to have their second little girl and they couldn’t be more thrilled. This household is filled with all girls, including their doggie Belle. Needless to say, they’ve created some beautiful girls and we’re so proud to have been able to photograph both newborn photography sessions for them.

You might remember Claire in her newborn photo

title.rendered: Hugh Taylor Birch Park  Family Session | Visbal Family

content:
For our yearly family photo session with the Visbal Family, we made sure to get everything booked and set for them way ahead of time. Nothing was going to get in the way of their 2021 session…except when it comes to rain. It ALWAYS gets in the way.

Despite having to reschedule their Hugh Taylor Birch Park Family Session twice…it’s true what they say about the third time…except, it wasn’t a charm! Our actual rescheduled, photoshoot raincheck date, ended up r

title.rendered: Fort Lauderdale Indian Wedding | Alissa + Imran

content:
This next amazing wedding, was a cultural celebration right in the heart of Fort Lauderdale.

Alissa + Imran got to have their Indian Wedding celebration with their closest family and friends and we got to be a part of it! It was so much fun being able to work together with this beautiful couple. It was such a pleasure to be able to work with thee most amazing team:

MUA: Deja Lanee +

title.rendered: The Cruz Building Engagement | Oni + Noel

content:
This next couple will be getting married next month and we cannot wait!

Planning a wedding can be very overwhelming, especially during a pandemic, while a million unexpected things in life..just happen! Despite it all, Oni and Noel got to have their beautiful engagement session at the Cruz Building.

What a way to look so elegant and radiating through these epic photos. They sure came dressed to impress and we were totally loving it.

Warm tones, lots of light and drama, the

title.rendered: Dog Family Portrait | Doozer + Buckley

content:
They say (..who’s they?) “A house is not a home without a dog.” I can totally testify to that. Dana and Wesley are blessed to have TWO of them. They are the humans to the doggos Doozer and Buckley, were such a pleasure to work with for their Dog Family Portrait.

It’s not every day you get to marry your two loves: dogs and photography. I was totally stoked to be able to work on this one. This session was extra special as it was gifted to them by their lovely mom.

title.rendered: Robbins Preserve Family Session | Campilii Family

content:
Where do you even begin when you get to shoot your favorite people at Robbins Park for their family session?

First of all, I’m extremely proud to call you my family: brother, sister and coolest nephews in the world. Ale and Italo, you’ve taught me everything I know and I owe it all to the two of you. You’ve gifted me my career and I’m happy to be able to gift you these memories that I know you’ll be able to remember forever.

There’s so much to

title.rendered: Bal Harbour Anniversary Photoshoot | Ashley + Alex

content:
Ashely and Alex decided to celebrate their one year anniversary by capturing their memories at Bal Harbour.

Italo shot their wedding last year during their anniversary (they share the same wedding date!) and we go to capture their love after one year and a pandemic later.

Ashely said she wanted to get some boho vibes and also get in the water. This was a true recipe for BOMB beach photos! We love adventurous couples that are always up for anything. Despite not being a huge fan of

title.rendered: Matheson Hammock Park Family Portrait | Cardiello Family

content:
The family keeps growing and growing and we are so happy to capture the Cardiello Family for their yearly family portraits.

This time, we headed out to Matheson Hammock Park for this family sesh!

It was so fun capturing our dear friends and watching kids be kids. There’s nothing like siblings and it’s amazing how kids can get so big in the blink of an eye. Little Luca is already walking!

Such a pleasure being with you and creating some memories, enjoy some of ou

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park Maternity | Josey + Freddie

content:
There’s nothing better than watching a family grow, this time, with T W I N S. I had the honor of shooting Josey and Freddie’s Maternity sesh at Tree Tops Park for a true evergreen experience.

We just love Tree Tops Park and it never gets old coming here. It’s perfect for all types of sessions but this kind was truly something else.

They weren’t planning on having covid babies, little did they expect they’d be having covid twins! Yet, they rolled wit

title.rendered: Fern Forest Nature Center Wedding | Geriliz + Paul

content:
Limoncello, San Pellegrino, Pasta and ferns. This is how I’d sum up this Italian inspired Floridian wedding at the Fern Forest Nature Center.

It was such a pleasure finally getting to meet Geriliz and Paul. I have to say, this has been one of the most planned out weddings that actually everything went exactly as planned (and you KNOW that’s rare). You’re officially hired as a wedding planner, hehe!

Despite having a small, intimate wedding, this was definitely one

title.rendered: VIP Country Club Indian Wedding, NY – Tessa + Kurien

content:
We met Tessa and Kurien on their very own wedding day. The day couldn’t have been more perfect. End of July with zero humidity and a sunny day? I’ll take it!

How did we meet? This very day. It’s true. We don’t get to meet many of our bride and grooms until their wedding day. We usually prefer to even do an engagement session prior to the big day so we have a chance to bond and form a relationship.

Despite meeting Tessa and Kurien right on the spot, it was a

title.rendered: Bill Baggs State Park Family Session |The Rivera Family

content: We went to the gorgeous Bill Baggs Cape Florida State Park for this unforgettable session! The first of many to come for this absolutely stunning family of 3. When Daniela contacted us to photograph her family we were extremely happy! not only because they are good friends but also because they have the MOST delicious baby boy and we couldn’t wait to meet him. You’ll see what we are talking about when you scroll down and see him and his beautiful big blue eyes. Enjoy some of our f

title.rendered: Firefighter Family Session | The Albadalejo Family

content: We absolutely LOVED working with this super amazing family! It’s not everyday you get to go to the coolest fire station on earth right in FRONT of the beach in Miami and create beautiful memories for really really great people. It’s been a few years since our last family session with the Albadalejos so it was so nice to see them! Thank you for having us as part of your special family memories. Enjoy a few of our favorites from the session:

title.rendered: Connecticut Micro Wedding | Tammy + Tay

content:
For this next post, I got to work once again with Tammy and Tay, this time, for their Connecticut Micro Wedding.

You might remember these cuties from their fabulous Cold Spring engagement sesh in early May. I made them get in the water and get a little wet and they totally rocked with it.

For their wedding, we did something a little similar..except it was kind of not predicted, unwanted and definitely not pl

title.rendered: Wilton, CT Group Portrait | Personal Branding Photoshoot

content:
It’s not every day you get to stroll around Wilton, CT with a group of pretty ladies and shoot their group portrait for their personal branding.

I had such a great time working with these girls and vibing with their contagious positive energy. They made my job way too easy!

It was hot, it was sunny, yet these girls rocked their personal branding photoshoot and made it look so easy. Nothing like women that empower women with big smiles on their faces.

Thank you pretty l

title.rendered: Terrace On The Park Indian Wedding, NY – Tintu + Nemo

content:
This wedding I have to say was very special. Not only did we get to work with one of the happiest grooms we’ve ever met but we also felt like we became a part of Tintu and Nirmal’s (aka Nemo’s) family.

We had the pleasure of shooting their engagement session earlier this spring, with the most prettiest cherry blossom season right here in New York. What does this have to do with their weddin

title.rendered: Baby Portrait Miami | Olivia

content: We’ve been working with baby Olivia since before she was born! And she is the cutest little model out there! check out our latest session with this beauty queen and one of our favorite client:

title.rendered: Cold Spring, NY – Engagement | Tammy + Tay

content:
Photography is the gift that keeps on giving, after all, that’s exactly how we end up meeting most of our clients: through their very own friends.

When I met Tammy, she was walking one of our dear friend’s wedding. I never would’ve thought, just a few months later we’d be here, shooting her very own engagement sesh.

We had been planning the perfect session but the weather just didn’t seem to want to cooperate. New York has so many awesome locations a

title.rendered: Robbins Park Maternity | Giacaman Family

content:
By far this is one of the most special sessions this year! Not only this is our beautiful sister and brother welcoming another baby to the happy family of 3, but this happens to be the very awaited maternity session for THE FIRST baby girl of the family! We are so extremely excited to meet baby Gabriela coming soon!

This session seemed it was not going to happen yesterday, but despite the 80% chances of rain and the fact that it did rain and the park we had planed closed for the day, we

title.rendered: The Ritz-Carlton Bal Harbour Engagement | Jessica + Kiran

content:
We always LOVE it when we do a session at the Ritz Carlton in Bal Harbour! We used to be next door neighbors with this beautiful hotel a few years ago before babies and it bring back so many beautiful memories!

The original plan was to take the pictures at the beautiful beach they have in front but a tornado warning came earlier and the strong winds and uncontrollable rain made this impossible. What do you do when your clients fly all the way to Miami just to have their photos done wit

title.rendered: Garden Wedding | Lisay + Alex

content:
You could literally say Lisay and Alex didn’t let ANYTHING ruin their wedding day. Not a global pandemic and certainly not a tornado warning during their day.

We have never seen such a poise and happy and bride & groom enjoying their outdoor wedding even though the rain was heavy and winds were strong. This is what made of this day such a special occasion for everyone. To witness the kind of person you both are.What a beautiful couple in every posible way.

You both en

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park | Family Session

content:
What a better way to celebrate your 40 years of marriage than capturing this moment with the ones you love most: your family!

this is exactly what we did for this gorgeous couple celebrating the big 4-0!! So happy for you guys and the beautiful family you have created over the past 40 years. May you celebrate many many more years together! Please enjoy some of our favorites from this day:

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park Family Session | Miguez Family

content: Such a FUN bunch! We absolutely LOVED working with this gorgeous family of 5. They decided to go to one of our favorites parks here in South Florida: Tree Tops Park. We love the feel of this place because is so different, like if it came out of a book. Tall beautiful trees, lakes and random tree trunks scattered around make this park a truly magical place to visit. Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Central Park Indian Engagement | Tintu + Nemo

content:
They met during college almost 10 years ago, it was not love at first sight (for her) and he quickly got friend zoned. Of course, that all changed! This is the story of Tintu and Nemo.

Before we scroll down to the pictures we took in Central Park for this Indian Engagement session, I have to tell you a little bit about this sesh.

Tintu and Nemo contacted us during their quarantine and we scheduled the “perfect” spring day in April. They haven’t had the easiest y

title.rendered: South Pointe Park Portrait Session | Heimy + Harold

content:
South Pointe Park at South Beach in Miami is one of our ultimate favorite spots to shoot sessions, its such a fun, vibrant place that screams “Miami” from wherever you are looking. From the gorgeous white sandy beaches and turquoise clear water to the beautiful modern, funky architecture, you can’t gp wrong when choosing this location for your next shoot.

And it was the perfect location for this beautiful couple that came all the way from Boston, MA. They wanted that

title.rendered: Personal Brand Photoshoot | Jeilen

content: Meet Jeilen, a very talented and recently graduated Hairstylist. We loved working with her on capturing a few portraits and she looked stunning! here are some of our favorite from this session:

title.rendered: Secret Gardens Miami Engagement Session

content:
Miami is a beautiful, vibrant city with a lot to offer. From the beaches to the nightlife, there is something for everyone in this city. And one of the best things about Miami is this amazing place: The Secret Gardens Miami.

Meet Jane + Denzel: a proposal story.

title.rendered: Stamford Museum & Nature Center Micro Wedding | Yadi + Jordan

content:
There’s nothing more special than to be there for your friends on the day of their micro wedding in the middle of a pandemic when you can only have the closest of people right by your side. Yes. I had the h o n o r of witnessing and capturing Yadi and Jordan’s micro wedding at the Stamford Museum & Nature Center in Stamford, CT.

Story time. I can’t show you these pictures until I tell you a little background on these two. Yadi was the first person I “met&#

title.rendered: East Miami Wedding | Michelle + Felipe

content: Miami has it’s special vibes, and today’s wedding was nothing short of it. We met Michelle & Felipe when we were invited to cover their proposal photos, and they’re totally made for one another. Today marks their first special day for the rest of their lives, and we’re so thrilled to show you some behind-the-scenes images of their wedding day!

title.rendered: Vizcaya Engagement Session | Lisay + Alex

content:
Lisay’s inspiration for her engagement was from the series of Netflix “The Grand Hotel”. If you know what show we are talking about then you’ll know the feel for this session had to be European. In Miami, the BEST place to achieve this kind of look is definitely, no questions asked: Vizcaya Museum and Gardens. We absolutely LOVE Vizcaya for so many reasons, but our top reasons are:

1- It looks like Italy, and we love Italy!

2- It has stunning views anywher

title.rendered: Cold Spring, NY – Engagement | Yadi + Jordan

content:
For this next sesh, we decided to take it to Cold Spring. Why? The name says it all..because it should already be spring and it’s just plain cold!

With just a few days away from their wedding and lot’s of final things left for the big day, we decided to do an early morning engagement session this am. Streets were empty in this little town, zero humans around, what could possibly be wrong with this picture? The fact that we did NOT plan for it to be THIS cold. After many hea

title.rendered: Personal Brand Photoshoot | Alicia From Legally Techie

content:
Legally Techie. How cool is that name? You don’t often get to see girl girls I the tech workspace and Alicia blew our minds with her work! she is so down to earth and loves connecting with her customers and helping business owners with their biggest headaches. She has it all! if you ever need any advice form this gorgeous techie girl, make sure to call Alicia and check out her work here: www.ligallytechie.com and thank us later!

Meanwhile, enjoy some of our favorites from this per

title.rendered: Pawling, NY – Snow Portrait | Tifah

content:
What do Sunday’s and snow days have in common? My camera.

Woke up to a text. 2 hours later we met up. Where to? Wherever. Headed to Pawling Park. Nothing was planned. The colors were perfect. Tifah absolutely rocked this by just being herself. A true winter wonderland: playground version.

Free spirited, happy and go with the flow. Loved her energy during this shoot. It was absolutely one I will never forget. Not only did we get to shoot in a fun playground in the middle of a

title.rendered: Coral Gables Country Club Wedding | Chiara + Rene

content:
They say that it takes two to tango, and it’s no exception with these two. 

Rene always knew that Chiara was a lover of nature, and so he invited us to do their proposal and we put on our ninja masks, and went to work behind the scenes. Ever since then, it’s been such a blessing to work with them!

Chiara and Rene had been anxiously waiting for the

title.rendered: Florida Golf Course Wedding | Ashley + Alex

content: COVID19 changed EVERYTHING, but when you love someone and want to spend the rest of your life with them, nothing should stop you from doing so, even if this means downsizing your guest list and changing the venue you had in mind. You can still have the wedding of your dreams and Ashley and Alex did just that. They married at a beautiful gulf country club in a very intimate setting. Enjoy some of our favorites from this special day:

title.rendered: Miami Marriott Biscayne Bay Wedding | Natalya + Peter

content:
What a privilege it was to work this lovely wedding! Definitely one for the books in one of our absolute favorite venues in Miami.

Miami Marriott Biscayne Bay Wedding days are always a win! From the spectacular views of the bay to the highly amazing service you get its guaranteed your even will be a success.

title.rendered: Bal Harbour Maternity Session | Jessica + Danny

content: We absolutely LOVED working with Jessica, Danny and Benny for this beautiful sunrise maternity session! We felt like we’ve known each other from forever.. Thank you for trusting us with your special moment, loved creating these memories for you, enjoy some of our favorites from this beautiful morning:

title.rendered: Deerfield Beach Family Session |Visbal Family

content: For the past 5 years we’ve had the privilege to work with this gorgeous family. We feel so blessed to be part of Ximena and Alvaro’s precious memories they have has a family every year.. Thank you for trusting us guys, means the world to us! Enjoy some of our favorites from this iconic 2020 year:

title.rendered: Arlington, MA – Micro Wedding | Elle + Hector

content:
A New York Wedding. That’s what they initially had planned.

Many of our dear brides have had to really change their wedding plans, pushing dates, having smaller weddings, sacrificing wedding parties, honeymoon and dear ones not being there.

In the case of Elle and Hector, they had to do all that while having to change all their prepaid wedding plans and move their wedding all the way to Massachusetts. When we found out their wedding turned into a destination, micro wedding,

title.rendered: Tree Tops Park Wedding | Laura +Antonio

content: What a beautiful day this was. Tree Tops Park Wedding days are always a win! but for these 2 lovebirds it was truly something special. The forecast was predicting really bad weather, but to our surprise Florida decided to gift us the most beautiful blue skies instead. Laura you were one stunning bride. Even Chombi (their little dog) was super happy to see Laura walk down the aisle. We are so honored we got to be part of your union together, you make the most beautiful couple! Enjoy some of ou

title.rendered: Beacon, NY – Engagement | Elle + Hector

content:
He reserved a bookstore. She loves books. Hid a love story book in the shelves and then hid the ring inside a box that looked like a book. Binnacle Books in Beacon, NY. This is where Hector proposed to Elle (virtually), because you know, covid.

Fast forward to their engagement session, only a few days before their upcoming wedding in Boston. Right in that same Bookstore where she said: YES! Our friends at Binnac

title.rendered: Shoreham, Long Island, NY – Indian Wedding | Christine + Shawn

content:
700 people. May 30th, 2020. These were the original wedding plans for Christine and Shawn.

We met this awesome couple in the beginning of covid. Everything was all up in the air and super confusing. We shot their engagement session at the Brooklyn Bridge and thought we’d be shooting their wedding in just a couple of months. That wasn’t the case.

Everyone’s worlds got rocked, their wed

title.rendered: Rusty Pelican Wedding | Ashley + Mike

content:
Whenever we receive a wedding inquiry that says “Rusty Pelican” as the venue you can’t understand the excitement! 11 years ago my hubby proposed and then we got married there! so this place holds precious memories for us!

Ashley and Mike, you guys make such a beautiful couple and we felt honored to be part of your special day. The emotions where high and the pictures show how much love there was in the room from everyone to you guys. Here are a few of our favorites, en

title.rendered: Gather Greene – Coxsackie, NY, Anniversary | Tica + Justin

content:
What do you do when you’re in the middle of a pandemic and need to forget that you’re still in 2020 and it happens to be your 7th anniversary?

Easy. You go to Gather Greene.

*** BRIDES, SURE YOU READ TIL THE END ***

These lux, middle of the woods, tiny, woodsy, scandinavian, artsy, boho, cabins are all you need. AND they’re pet friendly. What else can you possibly wan

title.rendered: New Milford, CT – Fall Wedding | Si + Marcos

content:
This next wedding has our hearts. I had to give up my hubby (and awesome assistant) so he could marry our friends while I shot them. It was truly an unforgettable experience!

Despite the crazy circumstances we’re in and the endless amount of things these cuties had to tweak in order to have their perfect wedding day, this micro wedding was just EVERYTHING. I mean, we were all attacked by the bees (again). Totally Si’s fault! A groomsmen got stung in the middle of the cerem

title.rendered: Lincoln Road Miami Engagement Session | Natalya + Peter

content: We absolutely LOVE when we get clients like Natalia and Peter ready to make the most out of their session! We had a blast with these two! We got to enjoy a super fun afternoon in South Beach and it was almost empty for the first time ever! we where able to get inspired by the Tropical – European vibe this place has and get these cool shots:

title.rendered: Robbins Lodge Family Session | Rodriguez Family

content:
A few months ago we started venturing into another passion of ours, training people to grow their businesses, and we decided it would be a great idea to give our direct team a photoshoot, so here you have Amelia and her family, they come all the way from Orlando and made the trip for this special occasion! Meeting them wa so much fun, and it felt like we’ve known them for years!

When we started doing our training sessions, never did we imagined that this same team of girls will ev

title.rendered: Newborn Photography| Luca

content: There are times in life when you rejoice for accomplishments, and this is certainly one to remember. We’ve been photographing our friends ever since their first newborn was announced, and within the past decade, their little family of two rapidly expanded to becoming a beautiful family of six! As soon as they found out on Luca’s newborn date, they scheduled us to do Luca’s newborn photography right away and we brought the studio to their house. We’re so thrilled for

title.rendered: Blue Hill Farm Engagement, New York | Paula + Roy

content:
Paula and Roy chose the Blue Hill at Stone Barn farm location for their amazing engagement session. We have to just say, this next session is giving us all the feels.

These two were engaged in July, right on the day of their 10 year anniversary! They met at school and have been together ever since.

Paula and Roy were so much fun to work with. We got booked for this session overnight and they chose this great location: Blue Hill Farm right here in New York! The rest was totally unp

title.rendered: Fort Myers Wedding | Angelica + Jeasiel

content: This wedding was one for the books! It was an exciting one to be part of for sure! Not even a pandemic stopped these two lovebirds from having the wedding of their dreams, even though they had to sacrifice certain things they were determined to make the most out of this day, and sure they did! (they even jumped in the pool, because why not?) With only closed family members being part of the this special day it turned out to be very special, intimate and full of love with memories to treasure

title.rendered: Shula’s Hotel Wedding | Lorena + Manny

content:
Lorena and Many where determined to make this wedding happen, no matter what! Aside from the pandemic, that same day we where supposed to be hit by a category 1 hurricane BUT it didn’t happen! We had the most beautiful blue skies and were even able to fly a drone to take cool pictures and videos of the party!

The day started at the Sula’s Hotel in Miami where Lorena was getting ready with our beautiful and talented friend “

title.rendered: Waterfall Engagement, Connecticut | Si + Marcos

content:
For this engagement session, we decided to be a little spontaneous and go with the flow. At first, we had this whole session planned, location was set, but then we said, hey LET’S JUST DO SOMETHING DIFFERENT. So we did!

**disclaimer, we (by we I mean me) did have a mini heart attack because the location we were originally going to was temporarily closed**

Marcos was on it and found us a new spot right away. All he told Si was: make sure to wear a flowy dress, so she did! Sh

title.rendered: Sunflower Maze Proposal, Connecticut | Si + Marcos

content:
She. Said. SI!

:: pun intended ::

We can’t believe we got to witness this epic proposal at a sunflower maze! We were there the moment Si and Marcos met and here we are, 10 months later, seeing him get down on one knee while she yells out: YES!

Si had no idea he was going to pop the question right this day. I mean, after all, it was supposed to be a simple, social-distanced, girls day out, while Marcos was “away” for work. Yes, this whole proposal was based

title.rendered: Baby Photo Session Miami |Isaac

content: This baby right here is the cutest little thing! In the future, whenever we think of a happy baby this guy right here will pop to our minds forever. We have never seen a baby dancing bachata while moving his hips to the beat of the drums and throwing kisses to his auntie, fully enjoying life to the fullest! Enjoy some of our favorites from this little sailor, bachata dancer, professional cake eater:

title.rendered: New York Indian Wedding | Geeta + Vir

content:
I don’t even know where to start with this amazing Indian Wedding we got to shoot in Glen Cove, Long Island. Everyone was just full of life, celebration and color explosions (literally!)

This wedding was so unique on its own and it’s definitely one I will never forget. Right in the middle of the pandemic, Geeta and Vir had their very close family members join them in their forever union as husband and wife. This Sikh-Punjab wedding was very memorable as Geeta was breaking tr

title.rendered: Miami Beach Maternity Session | Cardiello Family

content: We look forward to working with our friends every year! It makes us so happy to be part of their special memories, and this one is so special as they are getting ready to welcome their fourth addition to the family! Luca will be so loved, can’t wait to meet him soon!

title.rendered: Miami Proposal | Chiara + Rene

content: Surprise proposals are our absolute favorite occasion to shoot! We love to be there and witness the raw emotions, the adrenaline, the love, the tears, the surprise face, the moment where it all started. And this time it was so special, Chiara and Rene make such beautiful couple, inside and out. Thank you for allowing us to capture such a special moment in your lives. Enjoy some of our favorites from this Miami Proposal at the Glass and Vine restaurant in Miami:

title.rendered: Baby Photo Session | Olivia Roze
Brooklyn New York Engagement | Geeta + Vir

content:
“We were supposed to get married last month in Mexico, 300 people”. Not an unusual quote. So many people have had to change their wedding plans due to covid, Geeta and Vir were no exception.

Despite it all, these guys are making the BEST of the situation to still move forward with their wedding plans, this time, in New York!

It was so fun and challenging at the same time shooting with a mask on and trying to guide them and having to yell so they could hear me. Literally: challenge

title.rendered: Country Club Prado Engagement Session | Angelica + Jeasiel
